[@microsoft/fast-element/hydration.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [HydrationDiagnosticResult](../fast-element.hydrationdiagnosticresult/index.html) &gt; [received](../fast-element.hydrationdiagnosticresult.received/index.html)

## HydrationDiagnosticResult.received property

Structured description of the server-rendered DOM that was encountered at the mismatch point. The default diagnostic leaves this `undefined`<!-- -->; install `hydrationDebugger()` to populate it.

**Signature:**

```typescript
received?: HydrationMismatchActual;
```
